content: Use .agents/skills/memory and ./skill memory for lightweight human-approved project memory; .claude/skills points to .agents/skills for Claude Code compatibility.
title: Memory skill and CLI

content: In this Nimloth VAGEN/verl checkout, the ordinary PPO trainer defaults to dp_actor with strategy=fsdp. Megatron is only selected by the separate ppo_megatron_trainer or an explicit actor strategy override, so default latent/action extraction work can prioritize FSDP first.
title: VAGEN PPO default actor strategy is FSDP

content: If multiple SSH retries fail during Nimloth remote work, treat it as a possible network problem, stop retrying, and ask the human to handle it.
title: SSH repeated failures imply possible network issue

content: When the human asks to query cluster resources, report each partition and each node's remaining GPU/CPU/memory, not only aggregate totals. Use experiments/navigation_baseline/slurm_gpu_resources.py when available.
title: Report per-node Slurm resources when asked

content: For future server-resource work, first submit a placeholder/hold job to reserve the target GPUs/nodes, then connect to the allocated node(s) for interactive operation; do not assume queried free resources will remain available.
title: Reserve server resources with placeholder jobs

content: SGLang (0.5.3.post3) has bugs in Nimloth VAGEN multinode PPO training; use actor_rollout_ref.rollout.name=vllm via vagen_rollout_vllm_cli.inc.sh. Prior sglang runs hit Ray/FSDP worker join failures and unstable rollout.
title: VAGEN baseline rollout: use vLLM not SGLang
